untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires identification of two specific bottoms (local minima) and the high between them, which cannot be expressed as point-in-time indicator conditions. The pattern relies on multi-bar structural recognition (comparing relative positions of low1, high_between, low2) that exceeds the capability of single-bar indicator comparisons. Volume confirmation on breakout can be approximated, but the core double-bottom identification requires pattern detection logic not supported by the allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation uses pivot points (pivot as high between bottoms, s1 as support level) and volume confirmation (hvol_20 for volume spike), but this does not capture the true structural requirement of two distinct bottom formations. A proper implementation would require custom pattern recognition logic or additional operators like 'forms_double_bottom' that can identify multi-bar structures.
